stemHtml: An aircraft is travelling eastwards and arrives at 11.00 to its destination for a 28 hour layover before travelling west again. Which of the following strategies is accepted as helping to reduce the effects of jet lag for aircrew?

options.a: Avoid bright light when arriving in the evening but seek bright light as early as possible in the morning.
options.b: Seek bright light throughout the day on arriving and keep the curtains closed in the morning.
options.c: Drink plenty of coffee in the morning to increase alertness at that time.
options.d: Take temazepam (insomnia treatment) shortly before the flight.
